basics.name: Mark L F Tlau
basics.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
basics.bio: Architecting and developing high-performance web applications. Focused on rapid client-side hydration, real-time communication, and scalable backend APIs using modern frameworks.

expertise.title: Full-Stack Architecture
expertise.description: Managing the full project lifecycle from requirements gathering to deployment, creating resilient backend services for commercial e-commerce platforms.

expertise.title: Real-time Systems
expertise.description: Implementing WebSockets, WebRTC, and Firebase listeners for low-latency peer-to-peer communication and messaging.

experience.description: Architecting and developing full-stack web applications for clients, including commercial e-commerce platforms and data-driven dashboards. Managing the full project lifecycle, from initial consultation to deployment and maintenance.
Developed and delivered the Computer Science curriculum for grades 5-8, focusing on foundational programming concepts and logical problem-solving.

projects.title: SvelteTube
projects.description: A video/movie aggregation platform built with SvelteKit, featuring a custom web scraper and integration with the Consumet API for a high-performance, reactive UI.

projects.title: Chat-UM
projects.description: A full-stack, real-time chat application with public rooms and private messaging, built using Next.js and Firebase for backend services and authentication.

projects.title: Peekaboo Watch-Party
projects.description: A WebRTC clone with persistent chat and low-latency P2P media synchronization.

education.degree: Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Applications (PGDCA)
